case_title: LEGALINK, INC. VS. WEISS, LLP et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
CRC 3.740 REVIEW
MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT WEISS, LLP MOGEEB WEISS HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WEISS, LLP AND MOGEEB WEISS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO ALAMEDA COUNTY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
